data.title: IREN secures $5.8B investment, plans $3.7B revenue with shift to AI cloud services, boosting revenue with Microsoft tie-up and GPU expansion.
data.description: IREN, a company listed on NASDAQ under the ticker IREN, has shifted its focus from Bitcoin mining to offering AI cloud services. The company is targeting a revenue of $3.7 billion through this strategic move, facilitated by a partnership with Microsoft. Additionally, IREN plans to expand its GPU capabilities to bolster its AI offerings.

data.title: GitHub Copilot transitions to AI Credit-based billing from June 1, 2026, matching pricing with user usage. Learn more.
data.description: Starting June 1, 2026, GitHub Copilot will transition to a credit-based billing system driven by AI, aiming to reflect user consumption accurately. This change in pricing model will impact the way users are billed, ensuring more personalized and efficient cost management. For more details on how this shift will affect users, please click on the link provided.

data.title: Alm. Brand A/S releases Q1 2026 interim report with key figures.
data.description: In recent statistics released, it has been reported that the number of job vacancies in the United States reached approximately 11.3 million in October. This increase comes as businesses across various industries continue to ramp up hiring efforts in response to the ongoing labor shortage. The rise in job openings signals a positive trend in the economy, with industries such as hospitality, retail, and healthcare showing the highest demand for new hires. The data indicates a strong growth in job opportunities for individuals looking to enter or re-enter the workforce. Additionally, the number of unemployed individuals per job opening has decreased, highlighting a more favorable job market for job seekers. This surge in job availability presents opportunities for both employers and job seekers to find suitable matches in the current competitive labor market.

data.title: Ant International Launches Open-Sourced Agentic Mobile Protocol to Drive AI Commerce
data.description: Ant International, based in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, has announced the launch of the Agentic Mobile Protocol (AMP). This innovative technology aims to facilitate secure agentic payment connections to mobile services. By leveraging AMP, users can experience seamless and safe transactions through their mobile devices. AMP is designed to enhance the efficiency and security of mobile payment processes, ensuring a smooth and reliable experience for users.

data.title: LTM Launches BlueVerse™ Studio as a Hub for Enterprise Agentic AI Adoption
data.description: In Bengaluru, India, LTM has introduced its BlueVerse Studio, a specialized center aimed at fast-tracking Enterprise Agentic AI implementation.
